unit.description: Base spacing unit. All spacing values are multiples of 4px to maintain vertical rhythm and alignment consistency.

xxs.description: 4px — Minimum spacing. Used for inline icon-to-text gaps, tight badge padding, dense list separators.

xs.description: 8px — Tight spacing. Used for spacing between related elements within a component (e.g., icon and label in a chip).

sm.description: 12px — Small spacing. Card internal padding (top/bottom), small gaps between stacked elements.

md.description: 16px — Default spacing. Screen horizontal margins, card horizontal padding, standard gap between list items.

lg.description: 20px — Comfortable spacing. Padding inside larger cards, gap between card groups.

xl.description: 24px — Generous spacing. Section separators, header bottom padding, modal internal padding.

2xl.description: 32px — Section break. Space between major content sections on a screen.

3xl.description: 40px — Large section break. Top padding after a header, bottom padding before fixed bottom bars.

4xl.description: 48px — Component height standard. Touch target minimum height, button height, nav bar height.

5xl.description: 64px — Maximum spacing. Only for hero section top padding, onboarding illustration spacing, empty state breathing room.

none.description: No border radius. Used for full-width dividers and flat elements.

sm.description: Small radius. Buttons, text input fields, chips, inline tags, small action containers.

md.description: Medium radius. Cards, modals, bottom sheets, notification banners. Default container radius.

lg.description: Large radius. Featured/hero cards, floating action containers, image cards, prominent CTA buttons.

full.description: Pill/circle shape. Avatars, circular icon buttons, pill-shaped badges, toggle tracks, status dots.

none.description: No elevation. Flat elements on their parent surface.

low.description: Subtle lift. Cards resting on a surface in light mode. In dark mode, use surface color differentiation instead.

medium.description: Clear elevation. Dropdown menus, floating action buttons, popovers.

high.description: Strong elevation. Modals, full-screen overlays, drawer sheets.

streakActive.description: Orange glow for active streak elements. Applied to streak counter and fire icon on the dashboard.

brandPurple.description: Purple glow for primary CTAs and focused brand elements.

danger.description: Red glow for streak failure screen elements.
